issues.detail: structural edit_scope too broad; start with one reversible probe
issues.rewrite_hint: Narrow the task to one reversible operation in one target region. Split multi-step rewrites into independent probe tasks.

issues.detail: rollback_or_shrink_plan must describe a smaller/guarded probe
issues.rewrite_hint: Describe a smaller guarded probe, not only a revert. Bad: 'Revert the patch.' Good: 'Shrink to one guarded branch in the target region; keep the old path as fallback; revert if the guarded probe fails.'
